selectionRule: Choose one highest-value item supported by live evidence; never bundle unrelated items.

items.title: Complete verified Cloudflare baseline browser audit
items.risk: headless WebGL differences or incomplete failure evidence
acceptance: record exact main SHA and matching immutable deployment receipt
record real Cloudflare URL and passed HTTP smoke test
inspect desktop and touch/mobile full-scroll behavior
record console, page-error and failed-request observations
verify reduced-motion behavior
exercise WebGL failure or context-loss recovery when supported

items.title: Self-host and audit active fonts
items.expectedGain: removes fragile font hotlinks and closes a documented provenance blocker
items.risk: font metric changes or unnecessary payload
acceptance: exact Inter and DM Mono package licenses/authors recorded
no requests to Google Fonts hosts
only required WOFF2 weights/subsets included
typography and fallback behavior verified on deployed candidate

items.title: Replace linear camera descent with authored camera rail
items.expectedGain: major improvement to spatial storytelling and transitions
acceptance: distinct camera position and look target per scene
continuous interpolation without jumps
mobile and reduced-motion behavior verified

items.title: Create distinct procedural world identities
items.expectedGain: reduces repeated-cluster appearance and improves project differentiation
acceptance: at least three visibly distinct procedural systems
shared art direction remains coherent
adaptive quality limits geometry cost

items.title: Evaluate a CC0 snowy HDRI lighting pass
items.expectedGain: may add coherent crystalline reflections and roughness depth
items.risk: literal outdoor reflections, startup cost or mobile memory pressure
acceptance: use a vendored 1K or 2K CC0 HDR variant
record transfer and decoded-memory cost
compare material depth against procedural-light baseline
retain clean procedural-light fallback

items.title: Add cinematic loading and failure recovery
acceptance: honest initialization progress or staged reveal
WebGL failure fallback
no content trap for reduced motion or mobile

items.title: Implement measured adaptive quality
acceptance: bounded pixel ratio and effects tiers
particle or post-processing degradation path
no critical visual regression on desktop
